BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: Issue is exploitable through normal remote access to Salesforce UI/APIs where the field enforcement is relied upon.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: No special conditions are needed beyond the misconfiguration being present.

BASE.name: PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
BASE.justification: A standard authenticated user can be affected by missing/incorrect required-field enforcement paths.

BASE.name: USER_INTERACTION
BASE.justification: No additional user action is required once the misconfiguration exists.

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: Impacts occur within the same Salesforce org/application scope.

BASE.name: CONFIDENTIALITY
BASE.justification: Inconsistent enforcement can expose data entry/visibility paths and business-sensitive fields to unintended audiences.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: Primary issue is enforcement/validation; potential data quality integrity impact is limited.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: Misconfiguration consequences are easily demonstrated and commonly understood.

TEMPORAL.name: REMEDIATION_LEVEL
TEMPORAL.justification: Can be quickly addressed by updating Page Layout / FLS configuration.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: Static analysis rule provides high-confidence identification.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_VECTOR
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Attack remains feasible over network access paths.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: No added complexity in typical deployments.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: A standard authenticated user can be affected by missing/incorrect required-field enforcement paths

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_CONFIDENTIALITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Sensitive business fields often raise confidentiality impact.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: CONFIDENTIALITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Salesforce orgs frequently treat customer/business data as highly sensitive.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: INTEGRITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Data correctness is important but usually secondary to confidentiality here.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: AVAILABILITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Availability is not materially affected by this rule.
